name: Chicken and Ham Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen asparagus or cut broccoli, thawed
2 cups cubed cooked chicken or turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna noodles according to package directions. Rinse and drain.
2. In a saucepan, melt margarine. Blend in flour, onion, garlic powder, and pepper.
3. Add chicken broth and milk. Cook and stir until bubbly.
4. Stir in 1/2 cup of grated Parmesan cheese and mushroom pieces.
5. In a 13x9" pan, layer half of the noodles, asparagus or broccoli, chicken or turkey, and mozzarella cheese.
6. Top with half of the sauce.
7. Add cubed cooked ham, rest of the noodles, rest of the sauce, and second cup of Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
9. Let stand for 10 minutes before cutting.
10. Can be made ahead, refrigerated, and baked for 45-55 minutes.
